  "complexity_notes": "This is an OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification for a Task Manager REST API. It defines 10 endpoints across 5 tags (Tasks, Assignments, Comments, Attachments, Search & Batch) with full CRUD operations, pagination, search, and batch processing. The spec includes 12 reusable schemas (Task, User, Comment, Attachment, etc.), 3 security schemes (bearerAuth, apiKey), and standardized error responses. The structure is highly modular with extensive use of $ref for reuse. Complexity arises from the nested schema definitions, polymorphic response types (oneOf in batch results), and detailed validation constraints (patterns, enums, min/max lengths)."
}
